name: @flowdoc/pdf-renderer-pilot
description: Isolated measured-contract PDF fidelity pilot for embedded Thai glyph proof.

scripts.build:content-parity-subset: python scripts/build-canonical-report-font-subset.py --request fixtures/pdf-pilot-canonical-report-content-parity-twelve-page-request.v1.json --subset packages/pdf-renderer-pilot/fixtures/fonts/FlowDocThaiCanonicalReportContentParitySubset-Regular.ttf --manifest packages/pdf-renderer-pilot/fixtures/canonical-report-content-parity-font-subset-manifest.v1.json --phase-id PDF-PILOT-08A --subset-id pdf-pilot-08a-ibm-plex-regular-content-parity-report --family-name "FlowDoc Thai Canonical Report Content Parity Subset" --postscript-name FlowDocThaiCanonicalReportContentParitySubset-Regular --subset-prefix FDPCPA
scripts.build:typography-regular-subset: python scripts/build-canonical-report-font-subset.py --request fixtures/pdf-pilot-canonical-report-typography-calibrated-twelve-page-request.v1.json --font-id ibm-plex-sans-thai-regular --source assets/fonts/IBM_Plex_Sans_Thai/IBMPlexSansThai-Regular.ttf --subset packages/pdf-renderer-pilot/fixtures/fonts/FlowDocThaiCanonicalReportTypography-Regular.ttf --manifest packages/pdf-renderer-pilot/fixtures/canonical-report-typography-regular-font-subset-manifest.v1.json --phase-id PDF-PILOT-08B --subset-id pdf-pilot-08b-ibm-plex-regular-typography-report --family-name "FlowDoc Thai Canonical Report Typography" --postscript-name FlowDocThaiCanonicalReportTypography-Regular --subset-prefix FDPTPR
scripts.build:typography-bold-subset: python scripts/build-canonical-report-font-subset.py --request fixtures/pdf-pilot-canonical-report-typography-calibrated-twelve-page-request.v1.json --font-id ibm-plex-sans-thai-bold --source assets/fonts/IBM_Plex_Sans_Thai/IBMPlexSansThai-Bold.ttf --subset packages/pdf-renderer-pilot/fixtures/fonts/FlowDocThaiCanonicalReportTypography-Bold.ttf --manifest packages/pdf-renderer-pilot/fixtures/canonical-report-typography-bold-font-subset-manifest.v1.json --phase-id PDF-PILOT-08B --subset-id pdf-pilot-08b-ibm-plex-bold-typography-report --family-name "FlowDoc Thai Canonical Report Typography" --postscript-name FlowDocThaiCanonicalReportTypography-Bold --subset-prefix FDPTPB
scripts.build:typography-subsets: npm run build:typography-regular-subset && npm run build:typography-bold-subset
